calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment (Opp Due 12/14/15; Reply Waived; Hearing: 12/16/15)
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gabriel Ross and Sarah Sigman of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger LLP telephone number 415-552-7272 for Plaintiff.
Shari Posner of Office of The Attorney General telephone number 510-622-2203 for Defendant.

The matter was not argued. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Application For Entry Of Judgment is granted. The court received a statement of non-opposition from the State of California. The court will execute the proposed order, statement of decision, and judgment submitted by the applicant. Order, statement of decision and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
